user.title: Eldes Gate
user.description: Sign in to the Eldes Gates cloud, or trigger a password-reset email if you've forgotten your password.

menu_options.forgot_password: Forgot password? Send a reset email

sign_in.title: Sign in to Eldes Gate
sign_in.description:
Use the same credentials you use in the official Eldes Gates mobile app.

The Eldes API only accepts one device UUID per account at a time. Leaving "Device UUID" blank mints a fresh one — adding HA will sign the phone app out the next time it logs in. To keep the phone working alongside HA, paste the phone's UUID into this field (see the integration README for how to extract `vendorid` from the app's SharedPreferences).

forgot_password.title: Send password reset email
forgot_password.description: Enter the email address registered on your Eldes account. The cloud will email you a reset link.

reauth_confirm.title: Eldes re-authentication
reauth_confirm.description: Your saved password is no longer accepted by the server.

reauth_password.title: Re-enter Eldes password
reauth_password.description: Your saved password is no longer accepted by the server.

error.invalid_auth: The phone or password is wrong.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Eldes API. Check your network and try again.
error.invalid_email: That doesn't look like an email address.
error.email_not_found: The Eldes server doesn't recognise that email (or it's not verified on your account).
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the Home Assistant log for details.

abort.already_configured: This Eldes account is already configured.
abort.forgot_password_sent: A password-reset email has been sent to {email}. Open the link in that email to set a new password, then re-add or re-authenticate the integration.

open.name: Open gate
open.description: Send an open command and wait for controller confirmation.

output.name: Output
output.description: Output number, control name, or zone name.

timeout.name: Timeout (s)
timeout.description: Max seconds to wait for confirmation.

refresh.name: Refresh devices
refresh.description: Force a refresh of the device list.
